title: The Fight Against Katakuri Begins
description: On pages 14–15, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Reiju, Unknown person #14, Sanji, Luffy, Pudding as Pedro’s sacrifice opens the escape route while Luffy enters the mirror world to hold Katakuri back.
scene: Luffy separates himself from the crew to face Katakuri in the mirror world while Sanji moves toward the cake plan.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: CACAD ISLAND, CHOCO- LATOWN

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Sweets factory

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: GyaA AAAA AAH!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Huh?! What just happened?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: D- Don't tell me lady pudding's husband has poisoned the-

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Ask him.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: S-So delicious, I could just die...()

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: The delicious- mess almost killed him!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: He looks like he's achieved Nirvana!

dialogue.speaker: Reiju
dialogue.text: This whipped cream is Sanji's Secret Weapon...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "The true essence of sweetness"... I wanna taste it, too! ♔

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's done! The ultimate whipped cream! "Sim sim whip!"

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: pudding, hold off on trying it for now.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: We can't afford to lose you.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Just imagine... once this cream is spread onto the cake...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Don't imagine! You'll die!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I've finished baking my fluffy Chiffon cake, black leg!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hold it down! It's so fluffy it's trying to float away!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Me too! I used your whipped cream

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: to make a super sweet and silky chocolate ganache!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Get a lid! It's so silky it's trying to jump out of the bowl!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Just before 6:05! We're on schedule!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Is the ship ready?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: It is!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: We'll finish the cake on board,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And meet up with the sunny as it heads this way!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Let's go! Time to defeat the woman making our friends suffer!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: One piece is on break next week. We plan to resume publication with issue 52.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: .1CH. 885 / end

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Down with Big Mom!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Every- thing he's got on one plate!

summary: This section advances the Luffy vs Katakuri storyline with 31 dialogue beats. Luffy commits to stopping Katakuri while the others continue the escape and Sanji turns toward the cake that may save them.
